notes: 2026-06-04T04:13:35Z GPU1 EqR no-Hydra 9x9 FutureSeed+feature-diff probe at cbbfbe9. Hypothesis: EqR attractor recursion should exploit learned cross-level FutureSeed plus low-scale manifold-shaped feature noise without needing Hydra or flash_attn; if loop depth matters on holes12/16, this is a real mechanism branch rather than easy-distribution saturation. Result: train CE step600=0.0005 in 82.5s; holes8 loop4 exact=1.0000, holes12=0.9844, holes16=0.8945; loop gains are large (holes8 +0.9375, holes12 +0.9766, holes16 +0.8945). Decision: continue EqR FutureSeed direction; next high-ROI test is not broad ablation but selector/noise scheduling or harder-hole transfer. Lesson: flash_attn is unnecessary for this experiment; PyTorch CUDA SDPA is enough for seq81.
